---
title: "About"
---

## Education

**Rollins School of Public Health, Emory University** — Atlanta, GA
*Master of Public Health, Biostatistics* (Aug 2024 -- June 2026)

- Pursuing Data Science Certificate

**College of Biological Science, UC Davis** — Davis, CA
*Bachelor of Science, Biological Science* (July 2019 -- June 2023)

## Work Experience

**Biostatistician** — Grady Memorial Hospital / Emory University School of Medicine (Oct 2025 -- Present)

- Large-scale claims data analysis (>2.1M patients), survival analysis, systematic review & meta-analysis, RCT efficacy analysis

**Research Assistant** — Emory University Rollins School of Public Health (Sep 2025 -- Present)

- Transcriptomic deconvolution (CIBERSORTx), unsupervised clustering for MDD immune subtypes

**Data Analyst** — Emory CIDMATH (Sep 2024 -- May 2025)

- ETL pipelines, Databricks platform, disease transmission simulation tool evaluation

## Interests

**Nemo** — My dog, born March 1, 2022. Best road trip co-pilot.

**Road Trips** — Irvine to Atlanta, Pacific Coast Highway (Route 1), Route 66, Davis to Kansas. More trips and photos coming soon!
